decision.next_action: Issue #245 (auth-context.tsx テスト追加) を次の実装対象とする。Issue #238/#239 は将来対応（Backlog）。

learning.last_failure_pattern: @vitest/coverage-v8 peer dependency: v4.x requires vitest@4, must pin to v1.6.1 to match vitest@1.6.1
learning.improvement_notes: 1) vitest coverage include pattern needed to avoid Next.js source map errors. 2) PR branch rebased onto main triggers CI; first PR creation may not trigger if branch is far behind. 3) Use git stash + rebase + force-push to resolve conflicts and trigger CI. 4) Current coverage: Statements 8%, Branches 48.9%, Functions 23.6%.
